temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dark, chaotic scene, a small, muscular man in a tattered white tunic is surrounded by a large group of armored soldiers. He is on his knees, clutching his head in a gesture of despair or pain, as the soldiers stand over him menacingly. The scene is filled with the motion of battle, with swords and shields clashing in the background. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a moment of intense conflict and peril, immediately putting the protagonist in a life-threatening situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, percussive, and dramatic orchestral music swells, accompanied by the sounds of clashing swords, grunts, and shouts.)
(00:04-00:06) The scene cuts to a different angle, showing the small man being brutally beaten by the soldiers. He is on the ground, and the soldiers are standing over him, striking him down with their weapons. The lighting remains dark and oppressive. (Storyline: This segment escalates the violence, showing the protagonist being overpowered and tortured by the soldiers, highlighting his complete helplessness.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The intense, dramatic music continues, punctuated by the heavy thuds of weapons hitting the man and the clashing of armor.)
